scene_labels.label: Anna leaves for the cafe after studying
scene_labels.description: Anna finishes a long study session, packs her laptop and notebook, and walks toward her favorite cafe on a calm, sunny morning.

scene_labels.label: Anna notices a mysterious package
scene_labels.description: At the cafe, Anna spots a small brown-paper package with no name, address, or label, and she becomes curious about it.

scene_labels.label: Anna finds a book and a note in the box
scene_labels.description: Anna opens the package and discovers a thin black book and a folded note telling her to look under table 7.

scene_labels.label: Anna watches the man at table 7
scene_labels.description: A man sits at table 7 reading and drinking coffee. Anna watches him from a distance and waits until he leaves the cafe.

scene_labels.label: Anna checks under table 7
scene_labels.description: After the man leaves, Anna slowly walks to table 7, bends down, and sees something taped under the table.

scene_labels.label: Anna hesitates and feels unsure
scene_labels.description: Anna feels nervous and uncertain. She wonders whether the situation is a joke or a real mystery, and she hesitates before taking the hidden object.
